query:
SELECT id, symbol, recommendation, entryPrice, created_at,
TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, created_at, NOW()) as minutos_aberta
FROM trades
WHERE status = 'OPEN'
ORDER BY created_at DESC;
